Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.TotalCategoryFacts.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.precomp_fully_faithful.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DaggerCategories.Categories.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DaggerCategories.Transformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DaggerCategories.Unitary.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DaggerCategories.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DaggerCategories.Functors.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DaggerCategories.Functors.WeakEquivalences.

Local Open Scope cat.


C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
∏ c c' : C,
unitary dagC c c' → unitary dagD (F c) (F c')


C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
∏ c c' : C,
unitary dagC c c' → unitary dagD (F c) (F c')

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
unitary dagD (F c) (F c')

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
is_unitary dagD (# F (pr1 u))

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
# F (pr1 u) · dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) =
identity (F c)
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) · # F (pr1 u) =
identity (F c')

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
# F (pr1 u) · dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) =
identity (F c)
 
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
# F (pr1 u) · dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) =
# F (identity c)

    
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
# F (pr1 u) · dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) =
# F (pr1 u · dagC c c' (pr1 u))

    
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
# F (pr1 u) · dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) =
# F (pr1 u) · # F (dagC c c' (pr1 u))

    
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) =
# F (dagC c c' (pr1 u))

    apply pathsinv0, dagF.
  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) · # F (pr1 u) =
identity (F c')
 
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) · # F (pr1 u) =
# F (identity c')

    
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) · # F (pr1 u) =
# F (dagC c c' (pr1 u) · pr1 u)

    
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) · # F (pr1 u) =
# F (dagC c c' (pr1 u)) · # F (pr1 u)

    
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
dagD (F c) (F c') (# F (pr1 u)) =
# F (dagC c c' (pr1 u))

    apply pathsinv0, dagF.
Defined.


C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
∏ (c c' : C) (u : unitary dagC c c'),
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u) =
dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c' c (unitary_inv u)


C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
∏ (c c' : C) (u : unitary dagC c c'),
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u) =
dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c' c (unitary_inv u)

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u) =
dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c' c (unitary_inv u)

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
pr1 dagD (F c) (F c')
  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u)),,
unitary_inv_is_unitary
  (pr2 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u)) =
dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c' c
  (pr1 dagC c c' (pr1 u),,
   unitary_inv_is_unitary (pr2 u))

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
isPredicate (is_unitary dagD)
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
pr1
  (pr1 dagD (F c) (F c')
     (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u)),,
   unitary_inv_is_unitary
     (pr2 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u))) =
pr1
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c' c
     (pr1 dagC c c' (pr1 u),,
      unitary_inv_is_unitary (pr2 u)))

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
isPredicate (is_unitary dagD)
 intro ; apply isaprop_is_unitary. 
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
pr1
  (pr1 dagD (F c) (F c')
     (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u)),,
   unitary_inv_is_unitary
     (pr2 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u))) =
pr1
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c' c
     (pr1 dagC c c' (pr1 u),,
      unitary_inv_is_unitary (pr2 u)))

  apply pathsinv0, dagF.
Defined.


C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
∏ (c c' : C) (u : unitary dagC c c'),
pr1
  (unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u)) =
# F (dagC c c' u)


C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
∏ (c c' : C) (u : unitary dagC c c'),
pr1
  (unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u)) =
# F (dagC c c' u)

  
C, D: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
c, c': C
u: unitary dagC c c'
pr1
  (unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c c' u)) =
# F (dagC c c' u)

  apply pathsinv0, dagF.
Qed.


C: category
dag: dagger C
x, y: C
p: x = y
pr1 dag x y (pr1 (idtodaggeriso dag x y p)) =
pr1 (idtodaggeriso dag y x (! p))


C: category
dag: dagger C
x, y: C
p: x = y
pr1 dag x y (pr1 (idtodaggeriso dag x y p)) =
pr1 (idtodaggeriso dag y x (! p))

  
C: category
dag: dagger C
x: C
pr1 dag x x (pr1 (idtodaggeriso dag x x (idpath x))) =
pr1 (idtodaggeriso dag x x (! idpath x))

  apply dagger_to_law_id.
Qed.

Section Precomp_dagger_functor.

  Context {C D E : category}
          {dagC : dagger C} {dagD : dagger D}
          {F : functor C D}
          (dagF : is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F)
          (dagE : dagger E).

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
disp_functor_data (pre_composition_functor C D E F)
  (dagger_functor_disp_cat dagD dagE)
  (dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
disp_functor_data (pre_composition_functor C D E F)
  (dagger_functor_disp_cat dagD dagE)
  (dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
∏ (x y : FunctorCategory.functor_category D E)
(xx : dagger_functor_disp_cat dagD dagE x)
(yy : dagger_functor_disp_cat dagD dagE y)
(f : FunctorCategory.functor_category D E ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
→ is_dagger_functor_comp dagF xx -->[
  # (pre_composition_functor C D E F) f] is_dagger_functor_comp
                                           dagF yy

    intro ; intros ; exact tt.
  Defined.

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
disp_functor_axioms
  disp_dagger_pre_composition_functor_data

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
disp_functor_axioms
  disp_dagger_pre_composition_functor_data

    repeat split ; intro ; intros ; apply isapropunit.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_dagger_pre_composition_functor
    :  disp_functor
         (pre_composition_functor C D E F)
         (dagger_functor_disp_cat dagD dagE)
         (dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE)
    := _ ,, disp_dagger_pre_composition_functor_laws.

  Definition dagger_pre_composition_functor
    : functor (dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE) (dagger_functor_cat dagC dagE)
    := total_functor (F := pre_composition_functor C D E F)
                     disp_dagger_pre_composition_functor.

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
is_dagger_functor (dagger_on_functor_cat dagD dagE)
  (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
  dagger_pre_composition_functor

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
is_dagger_functor (dagger_on_functor_cat dagD dagE)
  (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
  dagger_pre_composition_functor

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
x, y: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE
f: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE ⟦ x, y ⟧
# dagger_pre_composition_functor
  (dagger_on_functor_cat dagD dagE x y f) =
dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor x)
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor y)
  (# dagger_pre_composition_functor f)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
x, y: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE
f: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate
  (mor_disp (pr2 (dagger_pre_composition_functor y))
     (pr2 (dagger_pre_composition_functor x)))
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
x, y: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE
f: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (# dagger_pre_composition_functor
     (dagger_on_functor_cat dagD dagE x y f)) =
pr1
  (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE
     (dagger_pre_composition_functor x)
     (dagger_pre_composition_functor y)
     (# dagger_pre_composition_functor f))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
x, y: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE
f: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate
  (mor_disp (pr2 (dagger_pre_composition_functor y))
     (pr2 (dagger_pre_composition_functor x)))
 intro ; apply isapropunit. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
x, y: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE
f: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (# dagger_pre_composition_functor
     (dagger_on_functor_cat dagD dagE x y f)) =
pr1
  (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE
     (dagger_pre_composition_functor x)
     (dagger_pre_composition_functor y)
     (# dagger_pre_composition_functor f))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
F: C ⟶ D
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD F
dagE: dagger E
x, y: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE
f: dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : C,
pr1
  (# dagger_pre_composition_functor
     (dagger_on_functor_cat dagD dagE x y f)) x0 =
pr1
  (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE
     (dagger_pre_composition_functor x)
     (dagger_pre_composition_functor y)
     (# dagger_pre_composition_functor f)) x0

    intro ; apply idpath.
  Qed.

End Precomp_dagger_functor.

Section Precomp_with_dagger_weak_equiv.

  Context {C D E : category}
          {dagC : dagger C} {dagD : dagger D}
          {H : functor C D}
          {dagH : is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H}
          (dagE : dagger E).

  Context (wH : is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH).

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
disp_functor_ff
  (disp_dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
disp_functor_ff
  (disp_dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE)

    intro ; intros ; exact (isweqcontrtounit iscontrunit).
  Qed.

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
fully_faithful
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
fully_faithful
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
fully_faithful (pre_composition_functor C D E H)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
essentially_surjective H
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
full H

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
essentially_surjective H
 exact (is_unitarily_eso_is_eso _ (pr1 wH)).
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
full H
 exact (pr1 (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful _ _ _ (pr2 wH))).
  Qed.

  Section IntermediateProp.

    Context {F : functor C E} (dagF : is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F).

  Local Definition X
        (d : D) : UU
    := ∑ (ck : ∑ e : E, ∏ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) d -> unitary dagE (F c) e),
    ∏ t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) d,
          ∏ f : pr1 t --> pr1 t',
             (#H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t ->
                    #F f · pr1 (pr2 ck (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) = pr1 (pr2 ck (pr1 t) (pr2 t))).

  Local Definition kX
        (d : D)
        (t : X d) := (pr2 (pr1 t)).

  Local Notation "FF ^-1" := (fully_faithful_inv_hom FF _ _ ).
  Let fH := pr2 wH : fully_faithful H.

  Ltac inv_functor HF x y :=
   let H:=fresh in
   set (H:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF x y));
     simpl in H;
     unfold fully_faithful_inv_hom; simpl;
     rewrite H; clear H.

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : C, unitary dagD (H a) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f
  · # F
      (fH ^-1 (pr12 t' · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr12 t · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : C, unitary dagD (H a) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f
  · # F
      (fH ^-1 (pr12 t' · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr12 t · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
t, t': ∑ a : C, unitary dagD (H a) b
f: C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f
  · # F
      (fH ^-1 (pr12 t' · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr12 t · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
t': ∑ a : C, unitary dagD (H a) b
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 t' ⟧
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 (a,, h)
→ # F f
  · # F
      (fH ^-1 (pr12 t' · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))) =
  # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr12 (a,, h) · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
# H f · pr12 (a',, h') = pr12 (a,, h)
→ # F f
  · # F
      (fH ^-1
         (pr12 (a',, h') · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))) =
  # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr12 (a,, h) · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))

  · # F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h' · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h · dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))

  Local Notation "F '^-i'" := (fully_faithful_reflects_unitary dagH F) (at level 20).

(λ ck : ∑ e : E,
        ∏ c : C,
        unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e,
 ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
 (f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
 # H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
 → # F f · pr1 (pr2 ck (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
   pr1 (pr2 ck (pr1 t) (pr2 t))) 
  ?pr1

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
cnot:= F anot: E
c: C
u: unitary dagD (H c) b
u':= (fH ^-i) c anot
  (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC c anot
unitary dagE (F c) (F anot)

      exact (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF _ _ u').
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
cnot:= F anot: E
(λ ck : ∑ e : E,
        ∏ c : C,
        unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e,
 ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
 (f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
 # H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
 → # F f · pr1 (pr2 ck (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
   pr1 (pr2 ck (pr1 t) (pr2 t)))
  (cnot,,
   (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
    (let u' :=
       (fH ^-i) c anot
         (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)) in
     dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot u')
    :
    unitary dagE (F c) cnot))
 exact (λ t t' f p, X_aux_type_center_of_contr_proof b anot hnot t t' f p).
  Defined.

  (** Any inhabitant of [X b] is equal to the center of [X b]. *)

anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
∏ t : X b, t = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
t: X b
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv ((pr21 t) anot hnot)
:
pr11 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr11 t: pr11 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr11 t
pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) = pr1 t


      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
t: X b
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv ((pr21 t) anot hnot)
:
pr11 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr11 t: pr11 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr11 t
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) w
  (pr21 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr21 t

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
t: X b
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv ((pr21 t) anot hnot)
:
pr11 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr11 t: pr11 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr11 t
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) w
  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) = pr21 t

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (pr2 (c1,, k1) (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (pr2 (c1,, k1) (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv
  ((pr21 ((c1,, k1),, q1)) anot hnot): pr11 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr11 ((c1,, k1),, q1)
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) w
  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) =
pr21 ((c1,, k1),, q1)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) w
  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) = k1

  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)

   ∏ c : C,

  (λ e : E,

  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) a h =
k1 a h


      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) w
  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) a h =
k1 a h


      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) w
  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) a h =
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a anot
     ((fH ^-i) a anot
        (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot))))
  (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1 w)
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a anot
     ((fH ^-i) a anot
        (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot))))
  (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1 w) = 
k1 a h

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) w
  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) a h =
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a anot
     ((fH ^-i) a anot
        (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot))))
  (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1 w)
 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
w0: F anot = c1
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) w0
  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) a h =
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a anot
     ((fH ^-i) a anot
        (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot))))
  (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1 w0)

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b
→ unitary dagE (F c) (F anot)
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = F anot
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e)
  (idpath (F anot))
  (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
   dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
     ((fH ^-i) c anot
        (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) a h =
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a anot
     ((fH ^-i) a anot
        (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot))))
  (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) (F anot)
     (idpath (F anot)))

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b
→ unitary dagE (F c) (F anot)
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = F anot
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ e : E,
      ∏ c : C,
      unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e)
     (idpath (F anot))
     (λ (c : C) (u : unitary dagD (H c) b),
      dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF c anot
        ((fH ^-i) c anot
           (unitary_comp u (unitary_inv hnot)))) a h) =
pr1
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a anot
        ((fH ^-i) a anot
           (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot))))
     (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) (F anot)
        (idpath (F anot))))

        apply pathsinv0, id_right.
      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a anot
     ((fH ^-i) a anot
        (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot))))
  (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1 w) = k1 a h

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))

feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
pr1
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a anot
        ((fH ^-i) a anot
           (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot))))
     (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1 w)) =
pr1 (k1 a h)

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
# F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1 w) =
pr1 (k1 a h)

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
# F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1
    (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1
       (daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot))) =
pr1 (k1 a h)

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
# F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1
    (idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1
       (daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot))) =
# F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot)

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
c1: E
k1: ∏ c : C,
unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
→ # F f · pr1 (k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
  pr1 (k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t))
w:= daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i) a anot
  (unitary_comp h (unitary_inv hnot)): unitary dagC a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot))): # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
→ # F
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
  · pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = 
  pr1 (k1 a h)
feedtoqhelp: # H
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h
      · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 hnot = pr1 h
quack: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h · pr1 dagD (H anot) b (pr1 hnot)))
· pr1 (k1 anot hnot) = pr1 (k1 a h)
idtodaggeriso dagE (F anot) c1
  (daggerisotoid Euniv (k1 anot hnot)) = k1 anot hnot

        apply idtodaggeriso_daggerisotoid.
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
t = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot


    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot = t

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
transportf
  (λ ck : ∑ e : E,
          ∏ c : C,
          unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e,
   ∏ (t t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
   (f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
   # H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t
   → # F f · pr1 (pr2 ck (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
     pr1 (pr2 ck (pr1 t) (pr2 t))) Hpr1
  (pr2 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr2 t

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
isaprop
  (∏ (t0 t' : ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b)
   (f : C ⟦ pr1 t0, pr1 t' ⟧),
   # H f · pr12 t' = pr12 t0
   → # F f · pr1 ((pr21 t) (pr1 t') (pr2 t')) =
     pr1 ((pr21 t) (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
b: D
anot: C
hnot: unitary dagD (H anot) b
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
t0, t1: ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b
t2: C ⟦ pr1 t0, pr1 t1 ⟧
t3: # H t2 · pr12 t1 = pr12 t0
isofhlevel 1
  (# F t2 · pr1 ((pr21 t) (pr1 t1) (pr2 t1)) =
   pr1 ((pr21 t) (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)))

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  (** Putting everything together: [X b] is contractible. *)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
∏ b : D, iscontr (X b)

(∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b) → iscontr (X b),, HH

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

b: D

t: ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b
iscontr (X b),, HH

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
HH: isaprop (iscontr (X b))
t: ∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b
∏ t0 : X b,
t0 = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b (pr1 t) (pr2 t)

    exact (X_aux_type_contr_eq b (pr1 t) (pr2 t) Euniv).
  Defined.

  (** The object part of [G], [Go b], is defined as the first component of
    the center of [X b]. *)

  (** *** [G] on objects *)

  Context (Euniv : is_univalent_dagger dagE).

  Local Definition Go : D -> E :=
    λ b : D, pr1 (pr1 (pr1 (iscontr_X Euniv b))).

  Local Definition k (b : D) :
    ∏ a : C, unitary _ (H a) b -> unitary _ (F a) (Go b) :=
    pr2 (pr1 (pr1 (iscontr_X Euniv b))).

  Local Definition q (b : D) := pr2 (pr1 (iscontr_X Euniv b)).

  (** Given any inhabitant of [X b], its first component is equal to [Go b]. *)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
pr11 t = Go b

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
pr11 t = Go b

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
p1:= pr2 (iscontr_X Euniv b) t: t = pr1 (iscontr_X Euniv b)
pr11 t = Go b

    exact (base_paths _ _ (base_paths _ _ p1)).
  Defined.

  (** Given any inhabitant [t : X b], its second component is equal to [k b],
       modulo transport along [Xphi b t]. *)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b),
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e)
  (Xphi b t) (kX b t) a h = k b a h

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b),
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e)
  (Xphi b t) (kX b t) a h = k b a h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e)
  (Xphi b t) (kX b t) a h = k b a h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
p:= fiber_paths
  (base_paths t (pr1 (iscontr_X Euniv b))
     (pr2 (iscontr_X Euniv b) t)): transportf
  (λ x : E,
   (λ e : E,
    ∏ c : C,
    unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) x)
  (base_paths (pr1 t) (pr11 (iscontr_X Euniv b))
     (base_paths t (pr1 (iscontr_X Euniv b))
        (pr2 (iscontr_X Euniv b) t))) 
  (pr21 t) = pr211 (iscontr_X Euniv b)
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e)
  (Xphi b t) (kX b t) a h = k b a h

    exact (toforallpaths _ _ _ ((toforallpaths _ _ _ p) a) h).
  Qed.

  (** Similarly to the lemma before, the second component of [t] is the same
    as [k b], modulo postcomposition with an isomorphism. *)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b),
k b a h
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go b) (pr11 t) (! Xphi b t) =
kX b t a h

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b),
k b a h
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go b) (pr11 t) (! Xphi b t) =
kX b t a h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
k b a h
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go b) (pr11 t) (! Xphi b t) =
kX b t a h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e)
  (Xphi b t) (kX b t) a h
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go b) (pr11 t) (! Xphi b t) =
kX b t a h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
∏ p : pr11 t = Go b,
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e) p
  (kX b t) a h
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go b) (pr11 t) (! p) =
kX b t a h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
t: X b
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
transportf
  (λ e : E,
   ∏ c : C,
   unitary dagD (H c) b → unitary dagE (F c) e)
  (idpath (pr11 t)) (kX b t) a h
· idtodaggeriso dagE (pr11 t) (pr11 t)
    (! idpath (pr11 t)) = kX b t a h

    apply id_right.
  Qed.

  (** *** Preparation for [G] on morphisms *)

(** [G f] will be defined as the first component of the center of
     contraction of [Y f]. *)

  Local Definition Y {b b' : D} (f : b --> b') :=
    ∑ g : Go b --> Go b',
              ∏ a : C,
                ∏ h : unitary _ (H a) b,
                  ∏ a' : C,
                    ∏ h' : unitary _ (H a') b',
                      ∏ l : a --> a',
                        #H l · h' = h · f -> #F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g.

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) (a' : C)
(h' : unitary dagD (H a') b') (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)
     · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'))
     · k b' a0' h0')

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) (a' : C)
(h' : unitary dagD (H a') b') (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)
     · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'))
     · k b' a0' h0')

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
unitary_comp (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

F: C ⟶ E

a0': C

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
unitary_comp (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
pr1
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m) (k b a h)) =
pr1 (k b a0 h0)

# H m · pr12 (a,, h) = pr12 (a0,, h0)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
# H (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 h = pr1 h0

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E

b, b': D

a0: C

a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'

m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · pr1 h = pr1 h0

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
pr1 h0 · (pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · pr1 h) = pr1 h0

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
pr1 h0 · (pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · pr1 h) =
pr1 h0 · identity b

      apply maponpaths, (pr2 h).

dagC: dagger C

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h' =
pr1 h0'

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
pr1 h0' · (pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h') =
pr1 h0'

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
pr1 h0' · (pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h') =
pr1 h0' · identity b'

      apply maponpaths, (pr22 h').
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F (fH ^-1 hfh)
   · k b' a0' h0')

a0': C

m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
# F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g0

# H l0
· # H (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h'))) =

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
# H l0 · (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

# H (fH ^-1 hfh)
· (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
hfh · (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'
· (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'

g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'
· (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') · unitary_inv h'

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')

g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
?b =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'

m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')

hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧

g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
unitary_inv h0' · h0' = ?t2

        apply (pr22 h0').

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧

m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a

g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · identity b' · unitary_inv h' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · # H l =
f · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
is_unitary dagD (pr1 h)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b

h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)

g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧

unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
l0 = pr1 m · (l · unitary_inv m')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
is_unitary dagC (pr1 m)
 apply m.

l0 = pr1 m · (l · unitary_inv m')

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'

pr1 m · l = l0 · pr1 m'

      apply (invmaponpathsweq (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a')),
        pathsinv0, sssss.
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
# F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g0

h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m) =
k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'

l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
is_unitary dagE (pr1 (k b a0 h0))

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a a0 (unitary_inv m)
· # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

dagC: dagger C

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F
  (pr1 dagC a0 a
     (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
        (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a0') hfh)
· k b' a0' h0'

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star5: unitary_inv
  ((fH ^-i) a0 a
     (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h))) · l0 =
l
· unitary_inv
    ((fH ^-i) a0' a'
       (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')))
# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F
  (pr1 dagC a0 a
     (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
        (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a0') hfh)
· k b' a0' h0'

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
