Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star5: pr1 dagC a0 a
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a0')
    hfh =
l
· pr1 dagC a0' a'
    (invmap
       (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
       (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F
  (pr1 dagC a0 a
     (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
        (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a0') hfh)
· k b' a0' h0'

dagC: dagger C

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C

a0': C

a: C

a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'

alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧

# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F
  (l
   · pr1 dagC a0' a'
       (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
          (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h'))))
· k b' a0' h0'

alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
k b' a' h' =
# F
  (pr1 dagC a0' a'
     (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
        (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h'))))
· k b' a0' h0'

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
is_unitary dagE
  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m'))
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
k b' a0' h0' =
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a' h'

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
is_unitary dagE
  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m'))
 apply dagger_functor_on_unitary. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
k b' a0' h0' =
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a' h'

      apply pathsinv0, (base_paths _ _ ssss).
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
k b' a' h' =
# F
  (pr1 dagC a0' a'
     (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
        (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h'))))
· k b' a0' h0'

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' =
# F
  (pr1 dagC a0' a'
     (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
        (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h'))))
· k b' a0' h0'

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m') =
# F
  (pr1 dagC a0' a'
     (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
        (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h'))))

    apply pathsinv0, dagF.
  Qed.

  (** The center of [Y b b' f]. *)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
Y f

dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧

a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
Y f

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE

a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
Y f

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
Y f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
Y f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) (a' : C)
(h' : unitary dagD (H a') b') (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f → # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g0

    apply Y_inhab_proof.
  Defined.

  (** Any inhabitant of [Y b b' f] is equal to the center. *)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
∏ t : Y f, t = Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0'

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
∏ t : Y f, t = Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0'

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
t = Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0'

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0' = t

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0' = t

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
g1: E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
r1: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
pr1 dagE (F a0) (Go b) (pr1 (k b a0 h0))
· # F
    (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · pr1 dagD (H a0') b' (pr1 h0')))
· k b' a0' h0' = g1

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
g1: E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
r1: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
pr1 dagE (F a0) (Go b) (pr1 (k b a0 h0))
· (# F
     (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · pr1 dagD (H a0') b' (pr1 h0')))
   · k b' a0' h0') = g1

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
is_unitary dagE (pr1 (k b a0 h0))

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E

F: C ⟶ E

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
g1: E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
r1: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
hfh · h0' = h0 · f

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C

a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
g1: E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧

(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
h0 · f · unitary_inv h0' · h0' = h0 · f

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
g1: E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
r1: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
h0 · (f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0')) = h0 · f

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
g1: E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
r1: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') = f

dagC: dagger C

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
g1: E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧

(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') = f · identity b'

dagC: dagger C

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
g1: E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
r1: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
hfh:= h0 · f · unitary_inv h0': D ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
unitary_inv h0' · h0' = identity b'

      apply h0'.
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E

F: C ⟶ E

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0' = t


    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
transportf
  (λ g : E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧,
   ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) (a' : C)
   (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b') (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
   # H l · h' = h · f
   → # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g) Hpr
  (pr2 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0')) = pr2 t

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
isaprop
  (∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) (a' : C)
   (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b') (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
   # H l · h' = h · f
   → # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · pr1 t)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
t0: C
t1: unitary dagD (H t0) b
t2: C
t3: unitary dagD (H t2) b'
t4: C ⟦ t0, t2 ⟧
t5: # H t4 · t3 = t1 · f
isofhlevel 1 (# F t4 · k b' t2 t3 = k b t0 t1 · pr1 t)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  (** The type [Y b b' f] is contractible. *)

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧

dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
HH: isaprop (iscontr (Y f))
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
(∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b') → iscontr (Y f),, HH

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
HH: isaprop (iscontr (Y f))
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
iscontr (Y f),, HH

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
HH: isaprop (iscontr (Y f))
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
∏ t : Y f, t = Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0'

    apply Y_contr_eq.
  Defined.

  (** *** [G] on morphisms *)

  (** We now have the data necessary to define the functor [G]. *)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
functor_data D E

∏ a b : D, D ⟦ a, b ⟧ → E ⟦ Go a, Go b ⟧

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
E ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧

    exact (pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)).
  Defined.

  Definition G {x y : D} (f : D⟦x,y⟧)
    := (pr11 (Y_iscontr _ _ f)).

  (** The above data is indeed functorial. *)

dagD: dagger D

(h' : unitary dagD (H a') b) (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b)
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) = identity (Go b)

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b)
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) = identity (Go b)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b)
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) = identity (Go b)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b)
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) = identity (Go b)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b)
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde
  (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) = identity (Go b)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b)
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde
  (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) = identity (Go b)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b: D
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b)
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde
  (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = pr11 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
pr1 Gbrtilde = identity (Go b)

      apply idpath.

  (pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
   pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
   · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f'))

dagC: dagger C

a0: C

(∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b')
→ (pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
   pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
   · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')),, HHHH

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
HHHH: isaprop
  (pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
   pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
   · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f'))
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

  (pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
   pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
   · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f'))
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
(∑ c : C, unitary dagD (H c) b'')
→ (pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
   pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
   · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')),, HHHH

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

dagC: dagger C

F: C ⟶ E

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
l0 · l0' = l0''
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
?b = # H l0''

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') · f'
· unitary_inv h0'' = ?b

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') = ?y'

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
unitary_inv h0' · h0' = ?t2

          apply h0'.

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
h0 · f · identity b' · f' · unitary_inv h0'' =
# H l0''

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
h0 · f · f' · pr1 dagD (H a0'') b'' (pr1 h0'') =
h0 · (f · f') · pr1 dagD (H a0'') b'' (pr1 h0'')

        repeat rewrite assoc; apply idpath.
      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) (a' : C)
(h' : unitary dagD (H a') b') (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

dagC: dagger C

dagE: dagger E

∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) (a' : C)
(h' : unitary dagD (H a') b') (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a

k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

a: C

a': C

alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
unitary_comp (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

a: C

a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0

· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
unitary_comp (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
# F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)

a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
# H m · pr12 (a,, h) = pr12 (a0,, h0)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
# H (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 h = pr1 h0

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · pr1 h = pr1 h0

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
pr1 h0 · (pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · pr1 h) = pr1 h0

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
pr1 h0 · (pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · pr1 h) =
pr1 h0 · identity b

          apply maponpaths, h.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

b, b', b'': D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b

a0'': C

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
pr1 h0' · (pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h') =
pr1 h0'

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
pr1 h0' · (pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h') =
pr1 h0' · identity b'

          apply maponpaths, h'.

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# H l0 · (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# H (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'))
· (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C

l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
h0 · f · pr1 dagD (H a0') b' (pr1 h0')
· (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
h0 · f · pr1 dagD (H a0') b' (pr1 h0')
· (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') · unitary_inv h'
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

a: C

a': C

alpha: # H l · h' = h · f

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') · unitary_inv h' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
h0 · f · pr1 dagD (H a0') b' (pr1 h0')
· (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) =
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') · unitary_inv h'
 repeat rewrite assoc; apply idpath. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') · unitary_inv h' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') · unitary_inv h' = ?b
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
?b =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
h0 · f · (unitary_inv h0' · h0') · unitary_inv h' = ?b
 apply maponpaths_2, maponpaths , h0'. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
h0 · f · identity b' · unitary_inv h' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

b, b', b'': D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
is_unitary dagD (pr1 h)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# H l = pr1 h · (f · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h'))

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
is_unitary dagD (pr1 h)
 apply h.

m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
is_unitary dagC (pr1 m)
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
l0 = pr1 m · (l · unitary_inv m')

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE

  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'

b, b', b'': D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a' (pr1 m · l) =
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a' (l0 · pr1 m')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a' (l0 · pr1 m') =
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a' (pr1 m · l)

          apply sssss.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) =
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
sss'': k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) =
unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)

     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F

· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)

k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)

     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
is_unitary dagE
  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m))
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
pr1 (k b a0 h0) =
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m) · k b a h

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
is_unitary dagE
  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m))
 apply dagger_functor_on_unitary.

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f

     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F

· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m) · k b a h =
pr1 (k b a0 h0)

          apply sss'.

b, b', b'': D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f

  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'

     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F

unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)

· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

dagC: dagger C

dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star5: unitary_inv m · l0 = l · unitary_inv m'
?y =
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)

          apply pathsinv0, dagger_functor_on_unitary_inv_on_ob.

l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
?b = # F l · # F (unitary_inv m') · k b' a0' h0'

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
?b = # F l · # F (unitary_inv m') · k b' a0' h0'

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
?t1 = # F (unitary_inv m')

          exact (dagger_functor_on_unitary_inv_on_ob dagF _ _ m').
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F l
· pr1
    (unitary_inv
       (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m'))
· k b' a0' h0'
