C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') ssss: pr1
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
     (k b' a' h')) = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
k b' a0' h0' =
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a' h'

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') ssss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a' h' = k b' a0' h0'
 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') ssss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
# F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· k b' a' h' = k b' a0' h0'

          apply ssss'; clear ssss'.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F l
· pr1
    (unitary_inv
       (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m'))
· k b' a0' h0'

dagC: dagger C

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F l
· (pr1
     (unitary_inv
        (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0' a'
  (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
k b' a' h' =
pr1
  (unitary_inv
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m'))
· k b' a0' h0'

        apply pathsinv0, star4.
      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
G f = unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
G f = unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
G f = unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b' f) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
G f = unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b' f) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
G f = unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

dagC: dagger C

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b' f) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b' f) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
pr1 Gbrtilde =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

        apply idpath.
      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

dagC: dagger C

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b') (a' : C)
(h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'') (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b') 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

dagC: dagger C

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C

# H l' · h'' = h' · f'
→ # F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
  k b' a' h'
  · (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C

alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'

· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

dagD: dagger D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''

m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
unitary_comp (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b', b'': D

h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C

l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =

· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

a0'': C

# F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
# H (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 h' = pr1 h0'

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h' =
pr1 h0'

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
pr1 h0' · (pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h') =
pr1 h0'

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
pr1 h0' · (pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h') =
pr1 h0' · identity b'

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · pr1 h' = identity b'

          apply h'.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')))
· pr1 (k b'' a'' h'') = pr1 (k b'' a0'' h0'')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
# H
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')))
· pr1 h'' = pr1 h0''

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'') · pr1 h'' =
pr1 h0''

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
pr1 h0'' · (pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'') · pr1 h'') =
pr1 h0''

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
pr1 h0'' · (pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'') · pr1 h'') =
pr1 h0'' · identity b''

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'') · pr1 h'' =
identity b''

          apply h''.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E

a0'': C

a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C

l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''

  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')

dagC: dagger C

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

· # H

# H (m · l')
 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l0'
· # H
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h''))) =
# H
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) · l')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l0' · (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) · l')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H (fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''))
· (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) · l')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0' · f' · pr1 dagD (H a0'') b'' (pr1 h0'')
· (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) · l')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0' · f' · pr1 dagD (H a0'') b'' (pr1 h0'')
· (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
h0' · f' · (unitary_inv h0'' · h0'') · unitary_inv h''

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

a0'': C

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C

alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) · l')

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')

# H

     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) · l')

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

a0'': C

a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C

ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')

     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')) · l')

m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0' · (f' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
pr1 h0' · (pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h') · # H l')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
is_unitary dagD (pr1 h')

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'

unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'

l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧

a'': C

          apply (invmaponpathsweq (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a'' )),
            pathsinv0, sssss.

dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
k b' a' h' · unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') =
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
sss'': k b' a' h' · unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') =
unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C

l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'

  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp

  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')

unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
is_unitary dagE (pr1 (k b' a0' h0'))

a'': C

  (unitary_comp

     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')

  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m))
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H

F: C ⟶ E

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
pr1 (k b' a0' h0') =
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
· k b' a' h'

dagC: dagger C

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')

star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
is_unitary dagE (pr1 (k b' a0' h0'))
 apply k.

dagC: dagger C

a'': C

     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
is_unitary dagE
  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m))
 apply dagger_functor_on_unitary.

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
pr1 (k b' a0' h0') =
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
· k b' a' h'
 apply pathsinv0, sss'.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
  (k b' a' h') = k b' a0' h0'
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F
  (fH ^-1
     (pr1 h0' · pr1 dagD (H a') b' (pr1 h')))
· pr1 (k b' a' h') = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
sss'': k b' a' h' · unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') =
unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0' a' m)
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

          exact (! dagger_functor_on_unitary_inv_on_ob dagF _ _ m).

m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F (dagC a0' a' m · l0') · k b'' a0'' h0''

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: unitary_inv m · l0' = l' · unitary_inv m'
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' = ?b

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
?t1 = # F (unitary_inv m')

          exact (dagger_functor_on_unitary_inv_on_ob dagF _ _ m').

dagC: dagger C

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F l'
· pr1
    (unitary_inv
       (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))
· k b'' a0'' h0''

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

a0'': C

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'

m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
is_unitary dagE
  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
k b'' a0'' h0'' =
