· k b'' a'' h''

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
ssss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a''
        m') (k b'' a'' h'')) 
  (k b'' a0'' h0'') ssss: pr1
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a''
        m') (k b'' a'' h'')) =
pr1 (k b'' a0'' h0'')
k b'' a0'' h0'' =
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a'' h''

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
ssss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a''
        m') (k b'' a'' h'')) 
  (k b'' a0'' h0'') ssss: pr1
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a''
        m') (k b'' a'' h'')) =
pr1 (k b'' a0'' h0'')
pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a'' h'' = k b'' a0'' h0''

          simpl in *; apply ssss'.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F l'
· pr1
    (unitary_inv
       (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))
· k b'' a0'' h0''

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F l'
· (pr1
     (unitary_inv
        (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') b'
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l': C ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) a0' a' (unitary_comp h0' (unitary_inv h')): unitary dagC a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
k b'' a'' h'' =
pr1
  (unitary_inv
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))
· k b'' a0'' h0''

        exact (! star4).
      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b') 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b') 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b') 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b') 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b') 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
Gbrtilde:= unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2
:
Y f': Y f'
G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),

· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2
:
Y f': Y f'
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f') Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')
G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')

:
Y f': Y f'

        apply idpath.

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')

unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =

· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
unitary_comp (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0

  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
pr1
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m) (k b a h)) =
pr1 (k b a0 h0)

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
pr1 h0 · (pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · pr1 h) =
pr1 h0 · identity b

dagC: dagger C

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

a0': C

  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · pr1 h = identity b

          apply h.

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
pr1
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
     (k b'' a'' h'')) = pr1 (k b'' a0'' h0'')

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'') · pr1 h'' =
pr1 h0''

a0': C

pr1 h0'' · identity b''

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l0'' · # H m' = # H (m · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l0''
· # H
    ((fH ^-i) a0'' a''
       (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h''))) =
# H (m · l)
 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l0''
· # H
    (fH ^-1
       (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h''))) =
# H (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l0'' · (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H (fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''))
· (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · pr1 dagD (H a0'') b'' (pr1 h0'')
· (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · pr1 dagD (H a0'') b'' (pr1 h0'')
· (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
h0 · (f · f') · (unitary_inv h0'' · h0'')
· unitary_inv h''
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · (unitary_inv h0'' · h0'')
· unitary_inv h'' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · pr1 dagD (H a0'') b'' (pr1 h0'')
· (pr1 h0'' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')) =
h0 · (f · f') · (unitary_inv h0'' · h0'')
· unitary_inv h''
 repeat rewrite assoc; apply idpath. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · (unitary_inv h0'' · h0'')
· unitary_inv h'' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · (unitary_inv h0'' · h0'')
· unitary_inv h'' = ?b
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
?b =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · (unitary_inv h0'' · h0'')
· unitary_inv h'' = ?b
 apply maponpaths_2, maponpaths, h0''. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · identity b'' · unitary_inv h'' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)) · l)

dagC: dagger C

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

· k b'' a0'' h0''

h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''

  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')

h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h'' =
# H

     (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h))) · # H l

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'') =

dagC: dagger C

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · (f' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h''))) =
pr1 h0 · (pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h) · # H l)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

dagE: dagger E

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

h: unitary dagD (H a) b

alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

pr1 h · (f · (f' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')))

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l =
pr1 h · f · f' · pr1 dagD (H a'') b'' (pr1 h'')

          
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

· k b'' a0'' h0''

a'': C

alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
l0'' = pr1 m · (l · unitary_inv m')

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
is_unitary dagC (pr1 m)
 apply m. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
l0'' = pr1 m · (l · unitary_inv m')

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

· k b'' a0'' h0''

m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''

  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a'' (pr1 m · l) =
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a'' (l0'' · pr1 m')

          apply pathsinv0, sssss.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')



        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

dagC: dagger C

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

· k b'' a0'' h0''

sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) =
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
sss'': k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) =
unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

   · k b'' a0'' h0'')


        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
sss'': k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) =
unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''

l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')

m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
sss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
  (k b a h) = k b a0 h0

star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'
sss':= base_paths
  (unitary_comp
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
     (k b a h)) (k b a0 h0) sss: # F
  (fH ^-1 (pr1 h0 · pr1 dagD (H a) b (pr1 h)))
· pr1 (k b a h) = pr1 (k b a0 h0)
sss'': k b a h · unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) =
unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
unitary_inv (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0 a m)
· # F l0'' · k b'' a0'' h0''

h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'
?b = # F (dagC a0 a m · l0'') · k b'' a0'' h0''

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

star5: unitary_inv m · l0'' = l · unitary_inv m'

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
is_unitary dagE
  (pr1 (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))

          apply dagger_functor_on_unitary.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F l
· pr1
    (unitary_inv
       (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))
· k b'' a0'' h0''

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F l
· (pr1
     (unitary_inv
        (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) b
a'': C
h'': unitary dagD (H a'') b''
l: C ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) a0 a (unitary_comp h0 (unitary_inv h)): unitary dagC a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i) a0'' a''
  (unitary_comp h0'' (unitary_inv h'')): unitary dagC a0'' a''
ssss: unitary_comp
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: unitary_inv
  (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
k b'' a'' h'' =
pr1
  (unitary_inv
     (dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF a0'' a'' m'))
· k b'' a0'' h0''

        exact (! star4).
      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
PR2: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) b) 
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0'' · k b'' a0'' h0''

· k b'' a0'' h0''

f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C

a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''

HGf: G f =

(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
Gbrtilde:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2
:
Y (f · f'): Y (f · f')
G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0'' · k b'' a0'' h0''

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b

(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') b'')
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
Gbrtilde:= unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2
:
Y (f · f'): Y (f · f')
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0'' · k b'' a0'' h0''

(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

· k b'' a0'' h0''

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b'' (f · f')) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
G (f · f') =
pr11 (Y_iscontr b b' f) · pr11 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''

unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· (k b' a0' h0' · unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0'))
· # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· (k b' a0' h0' · unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0'))
· # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'' =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
?b =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· (k b' a0' h0' · unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0'))
· # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
?y =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· (k b' a0' h0' · unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0'))

          apply maponpaths, pathsinv0, k.
        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · identity (F a0')
· # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''


        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0'' · k b'' a0'' h0'' =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · (# F l0'' · k b'' a0'' h0'') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0)
· (# F l0 · (# F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''))

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

· k b'' a0'' h0''

· k b'' a0'' h0''
