a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
# F (l0 · l0') · k b'' a0'' h0'' =
# F l0 · (# F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
# F l0 · # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'' =
# F l0 · (# F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
# F l0 · (# F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'') =
# F l0 · (# F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'')

        apply idpath.
      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
b, b', b'': D
f: D ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': D ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: C
h0: unitary dagD (H a0) b
a0': C
h0': unitary dagD (H a0') b'
a0'': C
h0'': unitary dagD (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · unitary_inv h0'): C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · unitary_inv h0''): C ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· (k b' a0' h0' · unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0'))
· # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'' =
unitary_inv (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
· (unitary_inv (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

      now repeat rewrite <- assoc.
  Qed.


  (** We call the functor [GG] ... *)

  Definition GG : functor D E := tpair _ preimage_functor_data
                                       is_functor_preimage_functor_data.

  (** ** [G] is the preimage of [F] under [ _ O H] *)

  (** Given any [a : A], we produce an element in [X (H a)], whose
     first component is [F a].
   This allows to prove [G (H a) = F a]. *)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0: C
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : C, unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t')) = # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t))

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0: C
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : C, unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t')) = # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0: C
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : C, unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(f : C ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t')) = # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0)
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · pr2 (a',, h') = pr2 (a,, h)
# F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 (a',, h'))) =
# F (fH ^-1 (pr2 (a,, h)))

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0)
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# F f · # F (fH ^-1 h') = # F (fH ^-1 h)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0)
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# F (f · fH ^-1 h') = # F (fH ^-1 h)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0)
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
f · fH ^-1 h' = fH ^-1 h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0)
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a a0 (f · fH ^-1 h') =
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a a0 (fH ^-1 h)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0)
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# H (f · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a' a0) h') =
h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0)
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# H f
· # H (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a' a0) h') =
h

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0)
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# H f · h' = h

    apply L.
  Qed.


  Definition kFa (a0 : C)
    : ∏ a : C, unitary _ (H a) (H a0) -> unitary _ (F a) (F a0)
    := fun (a : C) (h : unitary _ (H a) (H a0)) =>
      dagger_functor_on_unitary dagF _ _ (fully_faithful_reflects_unitary dagH fH _ _ h).

  Definition XtripleF (a0 : C) : X (H a0)
    := tpair _ (tpair _ (F a0) (kFa a0)) (qF a0).


  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0: C
(pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0 = (pr11 F) a0

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0: C
(pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0 = (pr11 F) a0

    exact (!Xphi _ (XtripleF a0)).
  Defined.

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
pr11 (H ∙ GG) = pr11 F

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
pr11 (H ∙ GG) = pr11 F

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
pr11 (H ∙ GG) ~ pr11 F

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
∏ x : C, (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) x = (pr11 F) x

    apply phi.
  Defined.

  (** Now for the functor as a whole. It remains to prove
      equality on morphisms, modulo transport. *)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
H ∙ GG = F

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
H ∙ GG = F

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
pr1 (H ∙ GG) = pr1 F

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
transportf
  (λ F : C → E, ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → E ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  extphi (pr21 (H ∙ GG)) = pr21 F

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
transportf
  (λ F : C → E, ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → E ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  extphi (pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f = (pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
Univalence.double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) (pr11 F)
     extphi a0)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) (pr11 F)
     extphi a0') ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
Univalence.double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) (pr11 F)
     (funextsec (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) (pr11 F)
        phi) a0)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) (pr11 F)
     (funextsec (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) (pr11 F)
        phi) a0') ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
transportf (λ c : E, E ⟦ (pr11 F) a0, c ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) (pr11 F)
     (funextsec (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) (pr11 F)
        phi) a0')
  (transportf (λ c : E, E ⟦ c, (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0' ⟧)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG))
        (pr11 F)
        (funextsec (λ _ : C, E) (pr11 (H ∙ GG))
           (pr11 F) phi) a0)
     ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f)) = (pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
transportf (λ c : E, E ⟦ (pr11 F) a0, c ⟧) (phi a0')
  (transportf (λ c : E, E ⟦ c, (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0' ⟧)
     (phi a0) ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f)) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
transportf (λ c : E, E ⟦ c, (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0' ⟧)
  (phi a0) ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f)
· Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (! phi a0))
· (pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f
· Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

Isos.z_iso_mor
  (Isos.z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0)))

     (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0)))

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E

Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)) (a' : C)
(h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0')) (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0)
          ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0)) · # F f
     · unitary_inv
         (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
            ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0')))

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H

a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0) 
          ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0)) · 
     # F f
     · unitary_inv
         (idtodaggeriso dagE
            ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
            ((pr11 F) a0') 
            (phi a0')))
Isos.z_iso_mor
  (Isos.z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0)))
· ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0')
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
HH4: fH ^-1 h · f = l · fH ^-1 h'
# F (fH ^-1 h · f) = # F l · # F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h'))

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0')
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
HH4: fH ^-1 h · f = l · fH ^-1 h'
# F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h)) · # F f = # F (fH ^-1 h · f)
 now rewrite functor_comp. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0')
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
HH4: fH ^-1 h · f = l · fH ^-1 h'
# F (fH ^-1 h · f) = # F l · # F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h'))

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: C
h: unitary dagD (H a) (H a0)
a': C
h': unitary dagD (H a') (H a0')
l: C ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
HH4: fH ^-1 h · f = l · fH ^-1 h'
# F (l · fH ^-1 h') = # F l · # F (fH ^-1 (pr1 h'))

      now rewrite functor_comp.
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0) 
          ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0)) · 
     # F f
     · unitary_inv
         (idtodaggeriso dagE
            ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
            ((pr11 F) a0') 
            (phi a0')))
Isos.z_iso_mor
  (Isos.z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0)))
· ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f


    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0) 
          ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0)) · 
     # F f
     · unitary_inv
         (idtodaggeriso dagE
            ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
            ((pr11 F) a0') 
            (phi a0')))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0)
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· unitary_inv
    (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
       ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0')),, PSIf
:
Y (# H f): Y (# H f)
Isos.z_iso_mor
  (Isos.z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0)))
· ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0) 
          ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0)) · 
     # F f
     · unitary_inv
         (idtodaggeriso dagE
            ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
            ((pr11 F) a0') 
            (phi a0')))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0)
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· unitary_inv
    (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
       ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0')),, PSIf
:
Y (# H f): Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Isos.z_iso_mor
  (Isos.z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0)))
· ((pr21 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
Isos.inv_from_z_iso (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0))
· (pr11 (Y_iscontr (H a0) (H a0') (# H f))
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

  · (pr1

Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1

          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
Isos.inv_from_z_iso (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0))
· (pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (H a0') (# H f))
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
Isos.inv_from_z_iso (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0))
· (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0)
     (phi a0) · # F f
   · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
       (pr1
          (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0'))
             ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0')))
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
Isos.inv_from_z_iso (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0))
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0)
    (phi a0) · # F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0')))
· Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

dagC: dagger C

PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))

(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),

→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0)

     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
Isos.inv_from_z_iso (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0))
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0)
    (phi a0) · # F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0')))
· Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) = 
?b

a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧

(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),

          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0)

· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')

          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
Isos.inv_from_z_iso (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0))
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0)
    (phi a0) = identity ((pr11 F) a0)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
∏ p : (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0 = (pr11 F) a0,
Isos.inv_from_z_iso (Univalence.idtoiso p)
· idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) p =
identity ((pr11 F) a0)

      intro p ; induction p ; apply id_right.
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
identity ((pr11 F) a0) · # F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0')))
· Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
# F f
· (pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
     (pr1
        (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0'))
           ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0')))
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
(pr21 F) a0 a0' f

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

dagE: dagger E

a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))

  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
# F f
· (pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
     (pr1
        (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0'))
           ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0')))
   · Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0'))) =
?b

C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
  (pr1
     (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
        (! (! phi a0'))))
· Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) =
identity (F a0')

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
  (pr1
     (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
        (! (! phi a0'))))
· Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) =
dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0') ((pr11 F) a0')
  (pr1
     (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
        ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0')))
· pr1
    (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
       ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0'))

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

a0, a0': C

PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),

     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0'))

            (idtodaggeriso dagE

  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE

          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)

  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =

  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) ·

· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
  (pr1
     (idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
        (phi a0')))
· Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) =
dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0') ((pr11 F) a0')
  (pr1
     (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
        ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0')))
· pr1
    (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
       ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0'))

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso (phi a0')) =
pr1
  (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
     ((pr11 F) a0') (phi a0'))

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
∏ p : (pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0' = (pr11 F) a0',
Isos.z_iso_mor (Univalence.idtoiso p) =
pr1
  (idtodaggeriso dagE ((pr11 (H ∙ GG)) a0')
     ((pr11 F) a0') p)

      intro p ; induction p ; apply idpath.
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
a0, a0': C
f: C ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) (H a0))
(a' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H a') (H a0'))
(l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0)) ((pr11 F) a0) 
          (phi a0)) · # F f
     · pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) 
         ((pr11 F) a0')
         (pr1
            (idtodaggeriso dagE 
               (Go (H a0')) 
               ((pr11 F) a0') 
               (phi a0'))))
Ybla:= idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0') 
          (phi a0'))),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtodaggeriso dagE (Go (H a0)) 
  ((pr11 F) a0) (phi a0) · 
# F f
· pr1 dagE (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
    (pr1
       (idtodaggeriso dagE 
          (Go (H a0')) ((pr11 F) a0')
          (phi a0'))) =
pr11 (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))
# F f · identity (F a0') = (pr21 F) a0 a0' f

    apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
is_dagger_functor dagD dagE GG

# GG (dagD x y f) = dagE (GG x) (GG y) (# GG f)

dagD: dagger D

Y (dagD x y f)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ (a : C) (h : unitary dagD (H a) y) (a' : C)
(h' : unitary dagD (H a') x) (l : C ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
→ # F l · k x a' h' =
  k y a h · dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
# F l · k x c' h' = k y c h · dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f)


      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
dagE (F c) (Go x) (# F l · k x c' h') =
dagE (F c) (Go x) (k y c h · dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f))

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
· dagE (F c) (F c') (# F l) =
dagE (Go y) (Go x) (dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f))
· dagE (F c) (Go y) (k y c h)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
· dagE (F c) (F c') (# F l) =
G f · dagE (F c) (Go y) (k y c h)

dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D

h: unitary dagD (H c) y

h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧

dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h') · # F (dagC c c' l) =
G f · dagE (F c) (Go y) (k y c h)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D

p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
is_unitary dagE (k y c h)
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
G f =
dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h') · # F (dagC c c' l)
· k y c h

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
is_unitary dagE (k y c h)
 apply k.

dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
p0:= (pr21 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))) c h c' h' l p: # F l · k x c' h' =
k y c h · pr11 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))
pf: # H (dagC c c' l) · h = h' · f
# F (dagC c c' l) · k y c h = ?t1

        exact (pr21 (Y_iscontr _ _ f) _ h' _ h (dagC _ _ l) pf).
      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
p0:= (pr21 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))) c h c' h' l p: # F l · k x c' h' =
k y c h · pr11 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))
pf: # H (dagC c c' l) · h = h' · f
pr11 (Y_iscontr x y f) =
dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
· (k x c' h' · pr11 (Y_iscontr x y f))

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
p0:= (pr21 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))) c h c' h' l p: # F l · k x c' h' =
k y c h · pr11 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))
pf: # H (dagC c c' l) · h = h' · f
pr11 (Y_iscontr x y f) =
dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h') · k x c' h'
· pr11 (Y_iscontr x y f)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
p0:= (pr21 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))) c h c' h' l p: # F l · k x c' h' =
k y c h · pr11 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))
pf: # H (dagC c c' l) · h = h' · f
pr11 (Y_iscontr x y f) = ?b
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
p0:= (pr21 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))) c h c' h' l p: # F l · k x c' h' =
k y c h · pr11 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))
pf: # H (dagC c c' l) · h = h' · f
?b =
dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h') · k x c' h'
· pr11 (Y_iscontr x y f)

      
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
c: C
h: unitary dagD (H c) y
c': C
h': unitary dagD (H c') x
l: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
p: # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f
p0:= (pr21 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))) c h c' h' l p: # F l · k x c' h' =
k y c h · pr11 (Y_iscontr y x (dagD x y f))
pf: # H (dagC c c' l) · h = h' · f
pr11 (Y_iscontr x y f) =
identity (Go x) · pr11 (Y_iscontr x y f)

      apply pathsinv0, id_left.
    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
F: C ⟶ E
dagF: is_dagger_functor dagC dagE F
fH:= pr2 wH: fully_faithful H
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
x, y: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
rhs:= dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f),,
(λ (c : C) (h : unitary dagD (H c) y) 
 (c' : C) (h' : unitary dagD (H c') x)
 (l : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧)
 (p : # H l · h' = h · dagD x y f),
 dagger_injective dagE (# F l · k x c' h')
   (k y c h · dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f))
   (internal_paths_rew_r 
      (E ⟦ Go x, F c ⟧)
      (dagE (F c) (Go x) (# F l · k x c' h'))
      (dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
       · dagE (F c) (F c') (# F l))
      (λ p0 : E ⟦ Go x, F c ⟧,
       p0 =
       dagE (F c) (Go x)
         (k y c h · dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f)))
      (internal_paths_rew_r 
         (E ⟦ Go x, F c ⟧)
         (dagE (F c) (Go x)
            (k y c h · dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f)))
         (dagE (Go y) (Go x)
            (dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f))
          · dagE (F c) (Go y) (k y c h))
         (λ p0 : E ⟦ Go x, F c ⟧,
          dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
          · dagE (F c) (F c') (# F l) = p0)
         (internal_paths_rew_r 
            (E ⟦ Go x, Go y ⟧)
            (dagE (Go y) 
               (Go x) (dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f)))
            (G f)
            (λ p0 : E ⟦ Go x, Go y ⟧,
             dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
             · dagE (F c) (F c') (# F l) =
             p0 · dagE (F c) (Go y) (k y c h))
            (internal_paths_rew 
               (E ⟦ F c', F c ⟧)
               (# F (dagC c c' l))
               (λ p0 : E ⟦ F c', F c ⟧,
                dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
                · p0 =
                G f · dagE (F c) (Go y) (k y c h))
               (unitary_inv_on_left dagE
                  (dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
                   · # F (dagC c c' l)) 
                  (k y c h) 
                  (G f)
                  (let X0 :=
                     λ (b : D) 
                     (a : C)
                     (H : unitary dagD (H a) b),
                     pr2 (k b a H) in
                   X0 y c h)
                  ((let p0 :=
                      (pr21 
                       (Y_iscontr y x
                        (dagD x y f))) c h c' h'
                        l p in
                    internal_paths_rew_r
                      (E ⟦ Go x, Go y ⟧)
                      (dagE 
                        (F c') 
                        (Go x) 
                        (k x c' h')
                       · 
                       # F (dagC c c' l)
                       · 
                       k y c h)
                      (dagE 
                        (F c') 
                        (Go x) 
                        (k x c' h')
                       · 
                       (# F (dagC c c' l)
                        · 
                        k y c h))
                      (λ 
                       p1 : E ⟦ Go x, Go y ⟧,
                       pr11 
                       (Y_iscontr x y f) = p1)
                      (let pf :=
                        internal_paths_rew_r
                        (D ⟦ H c', H c ⟧)
                        (# H (dagC c c' l))
                        (dagD 
                        (H c) 
                        (H c') 
                        (# H l))
                        (λ 
                        p1 : D ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                        p1 · h = h' · f)
                        (dagger_injective dagD
                        (... · h) 
                        (h' · f)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                        ... ... ... ... ...))
                        (dagH c c' l) in
                       internal_paths_rew_r
                        (E ⟦ Go x, Go y ⟧)
                        (dagE (...) (...) (...)
                        · 
                        (... · pr11 ...))
                        (dagE ... ... ...
                        · 
                        k x c' h'
                        · pr11 
                        (Y_iscontr x y f))
                        (λ 
                        p1 : E ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                        pr11 (...) = p1)
                        (! 
                        id_left (pr11 ...) @
                        maponpaths_2 compose
                        (! ...) 
                        (pr11 ...))
                        (assoc 
                        (dagE ... ... ...)
                        (k x c' h') 
                        (pr11 (...))) @
                       maponpaths
                        (compose
                        (dagE ... ... ...))
                        (! 
                        (pr21 (...)) c' h' c h
                        (dagC c c' l) pf))
                      (assoc'
                        (dagE 
                        (F c') 
                        (Go x) 
                        (k x c' h'))
                        (# F (dagC c c' l))
                        (k y c h)))
                   :
                   G f =
                   dagE (F c') (Go x) (k x c' h')
                   · # F (dagC c c' l) · 
                   k y c h))
               (dagE (F c) (F c') (# F l))
               (dagF c c' l))
            (dagger_to_law_idemp dagE 
               (Go x) (Go y) 
               (G f)))
         (dagger_to_law_comp dagE 
            (F c) (Go y) 
            (Go x) (k y c h)
            (dagE (Go x) (Go y) (G f))))
      (dagger_to_law_comp dagE 
         (F c) (F c') (Go x) 
         (# F l) (k x c' h')))): Y (dagD x y f)
# GG (dagD x y f) = dagE (GG x) (GG y) (# GG f)

    exact (base_paths _ _ (! pr2 (Y_iscontr _ _ (dagD x y f)) rhs)).
  Qed.

  End IntermediateProp.

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
is_unitarily_eso
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor_is_dagger_functor
     dagH dagE)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
is_unitarily_eso
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor_is_dagger_functor
     dagH dagE)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
F: FunctorCategory.functor_category C E
dagF: dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE F
p': hProp
f: (∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
 unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
   (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
   (F,, dagF)) → p'
p'

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
F: FunctorCategory.functor_category C E
dagF: dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE F
p': hProp
f: (∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
 unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
   (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
   (F,, dagF)) → p'
∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
  (F,, dagF)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
F: FunctorCategory.functor_category C E
dagF: dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE F
p': hProp
f: (∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
 unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
   (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
   (F,, dagF)) → p'
unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE
     (GG dagF Euniv,, GG_is_dagger_functor dagF Euniv))
  (F,, dagF)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
F: FunctorCategory.functor_category C E
dagF: dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE F
p': hProp
f: (∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
 unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
   (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
   (F,, dagF)) → p'
dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE
  (GG dagF Euniv,, GG_is_dagger_functor dagF Euniv) =
F,, dagF

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
F: FunctorCategory.functor_category C E
dagF: dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE F
p': hProp
f: (∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
 unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
   (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
   (F,, dagF)) → p'
isPredicate (dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE)
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
F: FunctorCategory.functor_category C E
dagF: dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE F
p': hProp
f: (∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
 unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
   (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
   (F,, dagF)) → p'
pr1
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE
     (GG dagF Euniv,, GG_is_dagger_functor dagF Euniv)) =
pr1 (F,, dagF)

    
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
F: FunctorCategory.functor_category C E
dagF: dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE F
p': hProp
f: (∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
 unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
   (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
   (F,, dagF)) → p'
isPredicate (dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE)
 intro ; apply isaprop_is_dagger_functor. 
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
dagE: dagger E
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
Euniv: is_univalent_dagger dagE
F: FunctorCategory.functor_category C E
dagF: dagger_functor_disp_cat dagC dagE F
p': hProp
f: (∑ c : dagger_functor_cat dagD dagE,
 unitary (dagger_on_functor_cat dagC dagE)
   (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE c)
   (F,, dagF)) → p'
pr1
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE
     (GG dagF Euniv,, GG_is_dagger_functor dagF Euniv)) =
pr1 (F,, dagF)

    apply is_preimage_for_pre_composition.
  Qed.

End Precomp_with_dagger_weak_equiv.


C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
dagE: dagger E
univE: is_univalent_dagger dagE
is_weak_dagger_equiv
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor_is_dagger_functor
     dagH dagE)


C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
dagE: dagger E
univE: is_univalent_dagger dagE
is_weak_dagger_equiv
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor_is_dagger_functor
     dagH dagE)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
dagE: dagger E
univE: is_univalent_dagger dagE
is_unitarily_eso
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor_is_dagger_functor
     dagH dagE)
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
dagE: dagger E
univE: is_univalent_dagger dagE
fully_faithful
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE)

  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
dagE: dagger E
univE: is_univalent_dagger dagE
is_unitarily_eso
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor_is_dagger_functor
     dagH dagE)
 exact (Precomp_is_unitarily_eso _ wH univE).
  
C, D, E: category
dagC: dagger C
dagD: dagger D
H: C ⟶ D
dagH: is_dagger_functor dagC dagD H
wH: is_weak_dagger_equiv dagH
dagE: dagger E
univE: is_univalent_dagger dagE
fully_faithful
  (dagger_pre_composition_functor dagH dagE)
 exact (Precomp_is_ff _ wH).
Qed.
